reasoning: The control AC-4(20) focuses on enforcing secure information flow using approved solutions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure communication channels and enforcing TLS for data in transit. This involves enabling TLS for Ingress resources, ensuring mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes, enforcing TLS in NetworkPolicies where applicable, and ensuring the API server requires TLS client authentication.
